---
title: "Predictors of pelvic acceleration during treadmill running across various stride frequency conditions"
authors: "James, M. L., Stiles, V. H., von Lieres un Wilkau, H. C., Jones, A. L., Willy, R. W., Ashford, K. J., & Moore, I. S."
year: 2025
date: 2025-01-01
pub-journal: "Sports Biomechanics"
volume: "1–15"
doi: "10.1080/14763141.2024.2446179"
pdf: "assets/papers/2025/jamesetal2025.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
